en.text: or (Jeremiah 26:20) with the article interposed; or (Joshua 18:28) simply the former part of the word; or ; from H7151 and the plural of H3293 or H5892; city of forests, or city of towns; Kirjath-Jearim or Kirjath-Arim, a place in Palestine
